data.name: Erotica
data.detailed_description:
You are a young man that just finished college with nothing to do. Your reclusive uncle George finally decided to go back into the world, leaving for a long vacation of a few months and offering you the easy job of house sitting for him while he is away. You jump at the opportunity to earn some easy money and live in a new place, one last period of fun and parties before real life starts. You visited him a few more times when you were younger but lost touch with everyone you knew there.



As soon as you approach the town line, you recognize a young girl named Riley and quickly renew your friendship with her. She is in a bad spot at the moment so you offer her a temporary place to stay in exchange for showing you around and introducing you to her friends... You soon meet her best friend, the spontaneous Lilly, her step sister, the evil Heather as well as a bunch of other people, each with their own story and unique personality.



Erotica features a relaxed play style where you impact your relationships and story through your choices. There is no grind, there are no mini games, instead you can enjoy a Visual Novel the way it's meant to be played. The game features partial AI voice acting for the girls, you can turn it on or off in the "stats" menu, found in the top right corner of the screen. The "stats" menu will also help you keep track of your relationship points, as well as allow you to turn hints on or off (this feature will display the stats changes in the choices menu).

What to expect:

5000+ rendered images
500+ adult animations
Two optional side stories
Partial AI voice acting
Fun and relaxed gameplay with some action elements
Hours of fun gameplay
And more!

data.short_description: Erotica is an Adult Visual Novel that takes you to the town of Hillside, here you will embark on a lovely and relaxing adventure, living a normal life with it's own ups and downs. The game offers multiple choices, relationship building and 7 unique endings which can be unlocked through choices.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
